Why Choose Us

Care designed around the patient, not the paperwork

Every part of MCH — from how appointments are booked to how doctors are scheduled — is built to get you to the right specialist faster.

Experienced Specialists

Consultants and surgeons trained at leading medical colleges across Bangladesh, the UK and the USA.

Modern Diagnostic Services

Digital X-Ray, ultrasonography, ECG and laboratory testing — all under one roof.

Affordable Healthcare

Transparent consultation fees and treatment costs, with no hidden charges.

Patient-Centered Care

Every treatment plan is built around the patient's comfort, history and recovery — not a checklist.

24 Hour Support

Round-the-clock patient care and emergency response, every day of the year.

Easy Appointment Process

Book online in under a minute, or simply call or message us on WhatsApp.

Diagnostic Services

Accurate diagnosis, on site

From routine blood work to imaging, our diagnostic team supports every department under one roof.

Digital X-Ray

High-resolution digital imaging for fast, accurate diagnosis.

Ultrasonography

Routine and obstetric ultrasound scans by trained sonographers.

ECG

Electrocardiogram testing for heart health monitoring.

Laboratory Services

A full-service lab for everyday diagnostic needs.

Blood Tests

Comprehensive blood panels with same-day results for most tests.

Pathology

Detailed pathology reporting to support treatment decisions.

About Us

Care First — a promise, not just a tagline

Madhabdi City (Pvt) Hospital was built to bring specialist-level healthcare to Madhabdi and the wider Narsingdi district, so families no longer need to travel to Dhaka for routine specialist care.

  • 11+ specialists across medicine, surgery, gynecology, pediatrics and more
  • On-site diagnostics: X-Ray, ultrasonography, ECG and laboratory services
  • 24-hour patient care with a hotline and WhatsApp line for urgent queries
  • Regular free health camps for the Madhabdi community
Contact

Visit us, call us, or message us

Our front desk is on hand to help you reach the right department.
